zh.Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen Municipality: 荷蘭努-拉藍德伯根艾姆德 阿 丹 霍福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerard III van Egmond於1250年出生在荷蘭努-拉藍德伯根艾姆德 阿 丹 霍福時，他的父親Willem II van Egmond30歲，母親Ada van Brederode18歲。他於1280年與Elisabeth van Strijen在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆-賓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1300年5月18日在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆德享年50歲，埋葬在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆德。

zh-hans.Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen Municipality: 荷兰努-拉藍德伯根艾姆德 阿 丹 霍福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerard III van Egmond于1250年出生在荷兰努-拉藍德伯根艾姆德 阿 丹 霍福时，他的父亲Willem II van Egmond30岁，母亲Ada van Brederode18岁。他于1280年与Elisabeth van Strijen在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆-賓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1300年5月18日在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆德享年50岁，埋葬在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆德。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Egmond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Esmond (Old English Ēastmund, ēast ‘grace, beauty’ + mund ‘protection’). A Norman French cognate, of ancient Germanic origin, is also found. See also Eastman .

variants.name: Eastman
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Estmund (Old English Ēastmund, from ēast ‘east’ + mund ‘protection’). See also Esmond .
English: occasionally a variant of Heasman, a topographic name for a dweller ‘(in the) brushwood’, from Old English hǣse ‘brushwood’ + mann (compare Hayes 3).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Swedish Östman (see Ostman ) and North German Ostmann or Östmann (see Oestmann ).

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerard III van Egmond was born in 1250, in Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen, North Holland, Netherlands, his father, Willem II van Egmond, was 30 and his mother, Ada van Brederode, was 18. He married Elisabeth van Strijen in 1280, in Egmond-Binnen, North Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 18 May 1300, in Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 50, and was buried in Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerard III van Egmond est né en 1250, à Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Willem II van Egmond, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ada van Brederode, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth van Strijen en 1280, à Egmond-Binnen, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 mai 1300, à Egmond, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Egmond, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas.

de.Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen Municipality: Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen, Nord-Holland, Niederlande
de.lifeSummary: Als Gerard III van Egmond 1250 in Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen, Nord-Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Willem II van Egmond 30 und seine Mutter Ada van Brederode 18. Er hat 1280 in Egmond-Binnen, Nord-Holland, Niederlande Elisabeth van Strijen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. Mai 1300 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Egmond, Nord-Holland, Niederlande und wurde in Egmond, Nord-Holland, Niederlande begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard III van Egmondが1250年にオランダノオルド-hオランドバージェンエグモンド アーン デン ホーエフで生まれた時，父Willem II van Egmondは30歳，母Ada van Brederodeは18歳であった。1280年にオランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンド-ビンでElisabeth van Strijenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1300年5月18日にオランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンドで50歳で死去し，オランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen Municipality: 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 버겐 그몽 아아 든 호프
ko.lifeSummary: Gerard III van Egmond(이)가 1250년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 버겐 그몽 아아 든 호프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Willem II van Egmond(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada van Brederode(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1280년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽-빈에서 Elisabeth van Strijen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1300년 5월 18일 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽에 묻혔다.

ru.Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen Municipality: эгмонд аан ден хоеф, биржен, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerard III van Egmond родился в 1250 г. в местности эгмонд аан ден хоеф, биржен, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Willem II van Egmond было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada van Brederode, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth van Strijen в 1280 г. в местности эгмонд-биннен, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 мая 1300 г. в местности эгмонд, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности эгмонд, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды.
